_source: AWS Key Management Service Official Documentation
description: Layanan manajemen kunci kriptografi AWS yang digunakan oleh ribuan perusahaan termasuk Amazon

traffic.note: Symmetric KMS keys share a quota of 10,000 requests per second per region

latency.note: AWS KMS expects external key store proxy to respond within 250ms

caching_recommendation.note: AWS explicitly recommends data key caching to reduce KMS API calls and cost
caching_recommendation.source: AWS KMS FAQs — data key caching section

simulation_use.improvement_note: Sourced from multi-cloud API gateway benchmark showing AWS API Gateway avg 54ms JWT auth
